mechanism_narrative: Higher 3-month growth in retail sales signals stronger household demand and improves near-term revenue expectations for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month RSAFS growth has Rank IC below 0.03 with 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling window, or if top-quintile RSAFS growth does not outperform bottom-quintile growth.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals weakening labor income and recession risk, causing equity investors to mark down earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases and the mean triggered return is not below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth combined with a near-zero policy rate identifies a low-discount-rate expansion in which earnings expectations rise faster than rates, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-FEDFUNDS trigger has lower 60-day forward returns than non-triggered periods, or if the interaction term is not positive in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: An upward break in the federal funds rate marks the start of policy tightening, raising discount rates applied to future cash flows and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS increases by at least 0.25 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if 60-day S&P 500 returns following FEDFUNDS tightening triggers are not below unconditional 60-day returns, or if the coefficient on FEDFUNDS changes is nonnegative in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Positive industrial production momentum signals improving factory output and operating leverage, raising near-term earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if 3-month INDPRO momentum has Rank IC below 0.03 with 5-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling window, or if positive momentum weeks underperform negative momentum weeks.

mechanism_narrative: A breakout in housing starts signals stronger construction demand, credit formation, and household balance-sheet confidence, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses more than 10% above its 12-month moving average
failure_condition: Reject if triggered HOUST breakouts fail to deliver higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than non-triggered periods, or if the hit rate is below the unconditional positive-return rate.

mechanism_narrative: Rising consumer prices combined with high unemployment creates a stagflation signal: margins face cost pressure while policy support is constrained, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-UNRATE joint trigger has positive 20-day returns in more than 60% of triggered observations or if its interaction coefficient is not negative in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A collapse in real GDP growth below stall speed signals broad demand weakness and falling aggregate profits, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered GDPC1 stall-speed episodes do not have lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than unconditional returns, or if the signal has negative-return precision below 45%.
